title: CorpFlowAI services system flow
description: Geometric four-node 'system flow' illustration anchoring the Services section on the CorpFlowAI homepage. Represents the core service loop: capture → route → log → summarise. Hand-crafted SVG, deterministic, brand-aligned.

licence.terms: Original CorpFlowAI mark. Free to reuse across CorpFlowAI surfaces; do not redistribute as stock or use in third-party marketing without written agreement.

accessibility.alt: Four-node geometric flow illustration representing the CorpFlowAI service loop: capture, route, log, summarise.

usage.notes: slot:homepage_services_graphic. Anchors the Services section above the four service cards. Pure SVG, ~1.6 KB on the wire.
